title: Syrian Beef Wraps
description: A flavorful and spicy Mexican-inspired wrap filled with marinated beef, herbs and spices. Serve with a side of garlic sauce for added flavor.

ingredients.name: Herb mix (such as oregano, thyme, and cilantro)

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together herb mix, molten pepper sauce, and olive oil.
Add the Syrian beef strips and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Grill the beef strips until cooked to an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
Warm the garlicky wraps on the grill.
Assemble the wraps by placing a few slices of the beef on each wrap and serving with additional garlic sauce on the side.
